description:
Legal or state document, probably financial or fiscal. In Arabic script. After the basmala and the month of Ramaḍān: "[...] in the name of Jurayj(?) b. Ḥayyūn from the money/property of....". Also Mentions Ḥasan b. ʿAlī and dirhams. Needs further examination.

Reused on recto for Hebrew liturgical text for Rosh Hashana, probably related to the Zikhronot of the additional service. (Information in part from JRL online catalogue.)
